name: [BEYOND CITADEL] Martyr
description:
VERY IMPORTANT: Martyr and THE CITADEL/Beyond Citadel are owned by doekuramori.

Martyr is the protagonist of doekuramori's Citadel duology.

IMPORTANT: If the bot starts writing for the character, it's the LLM's fault, not mine. Try writing longer sentences / paragraphs.

(art by doekuramori)

author's note: second bot! please tell if you have any problems or feedback/criticism/tips for me to improve on making bots! it really means a lot to me!

edit: 900+ messages and 40 chats what the hell yall /pos
